Petition For Order Establishing Special Needs Trust For Peggy Jo Spires
Off Calendar Apr-24-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 289580. Gary Lieberman appearing for and with petitioner Jodel Criss. Garfield Bowser, Sr. and Peggy Jo Spires are both in court. Counsel stated the disabilities of both Mr. Bowser and Ms. Spires. Court signed both exparte order appointing guardian ad litem. Venue issue addressed and submitted. Court will grant the establishment of the SNT.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Soret-Matley CSR# 9225. Clerk: Ella Yip.
